name: Orange-Almond Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup whole almonds with skin, toasted and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the first three ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Beat butter and sugar together in a bowl of electric mixer until light and smooth; add eggs one at a time, then extracts. Stir in almonds and zest. Sift dry ingredients over egg mixture, then fold in until dough is just mixed.
3. Form dough into two long logs and place in an oiled baking dish. Shape first log crosswise into half moon and second log into opposite direction. Press lightly to compress.
4. Bake at 325°F for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and firm. Cool on a wire rack before slicing.
